name: control mapping validator rejects a control entry missing the required framework field
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/validate-control-mapping.sh" --controls controls.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'framework' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
setup:
printf '%b
' '- control_id: CC8.1
  satisfied_by: [rubric_rule]
  legal_review_status: pending' > controls.yaml
